title: RNA Clean-Up by Phenol:Chloroform
author: Daniel J. Richter
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8y3hxyn

steps.title: Add 40 μL (1/10 of final...
steps.instruction: Add 40 μL (1/10 of final volume) of 3 M sodium acetate, pH 5.2. Final concentration will be 0.3 M. undetermined, 3 M sodium acetate, pH 5.2

steps.title: Add 880 μL (2x volume) of phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol pH 8
steps.instruction: Add 880 μL (2x volume) of phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol pH 8.0 undetermined

steps.title: Shake vigorously inside fume hood for 15 seconds
steps.instruction: Shake vigorously inside fume hood for 15 seconds. 00:00:15, Shake

steps.title: Centrifuge at maximum speed in a...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at maximum speed in a microcentrifuge at 4° C, for 2 minutes. 00:02:00, centrifuge

steps.title: Check solution for insoluble precipitate, indicating...
steps.instruction: Check solution for insoluble precipitate, indicating the presence of potassium salts > 20 mM.

steps.title: Transfer 420 μL of the top...
steps.instruction: Transfer 420 μL of the top aqueous phase to a new tube. undetermined, Transferred into a new tube.

steps.title: Add 840 μL of chloroform:isoamyl alcohol pH 8
steps.instruction: Add 840 μL of chloroform:isoamyl alcohol pH 8.0

steps.title: Shake vigorously inside fume hood for 15 seconds
steps.instruction: Shake vigorously inside fume hood for 15 seconds. 00:00:15, Shake

steps.title: Centrifuge at max speed for 2 minutes at 4ºC
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at max speed for 2 minutes at 4ºC. 00:02:00, Centrifuge

steps.title: Transfer 400 µL of the top...
steps.instruction: Transfer 400 µL of the top aqueous phase to a new tube.

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.5 µL of GlycoBlue. Final amount ~ 25 micrograms, working stock 15 micrograms/microliter. undetermined, GlycoBlue

steps.title: Add 1000 µl (2
steps.instruction: Add 1000 µl (2.5 volumes) of 100% ethanol undetermined

steps.title: Shake vigorously inside fume hood for 15 seconds
steps.instruction: Shake vigorously inside fume hood for 15 seconds. 00:00:15, Shake

steps.title: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 10 minutes at 4°C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 10 minutes at 4°C. 00:10:00, Centrifuge

steps.title: Pipette out ethanol, slowly, with P1000 then P10
steps.instruction: Pipette out ethanol, slowly, with P1000 then P10. Avoid leaving liquid on sides of the tube.

steps.title: Wash with -20 °C, 70% ethanol...
steps.instruction: Wash with -20 °C, 70% ethanol and centrifuge at maximum speed for 5 minutes at 4° C. 00:05:00

steps.title: Pipette out ethanol, slowly, with P1000, then P10
steps.instruction: Pipette out ethanol, slowly, with P1000, then P10. Avoid leaving liquid on sides of tube.

steps.title: Dry pellet and resuspend in 27
steps.instruction: Dry pellet and resuspend in 27.5 µL of water. undetermined, Water

steps.title: Spec on NanoDrop and dilute 1...
steps.instruction: Spec on NanoDrop and dilute 1 µL aliquot of RNA to 1 ng/µL in a separate tube (for Bioanalyzer)
